summary: Recent updates to the Media Source Extensions (MSE) in Firefox include enhancements aimed at improving testing and debugging capabilities for video formats. Notably, a new set of tests specifically targets the H.264 and HEVC (High Efficiency Video Coding) video formats, ensuring that the browser can handle various encoding scenarios, such as oversized picture widths and missing Sequence Parameter Sets (SPS). These improvements underscore Firefox’s commitment to maintaining compatibility with modern video standards, which is essential for smooth playback of high-quality streaming content. This work ultimately contributes to a more robust multimedia experience for users, particularly with media delivered through platforms relying on **streaming technologies**.
